rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Request For Osc: Re Contempt And Motion To Compel Nonparty Cloud City Vapors; Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 20, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH TIERNEY's Request For Osc: Re Contempt And Motion To Compel Non party Cloud City Vapors; Motion For Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. OSC Re: Contempt is denied. Motion to Compel is GRANTED. Responses without objections shall be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Monetary sanctions granted in the amount of $780. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP COLLINS et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Defendants Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records And Or For Protective Order; Requests For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 20, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFFS PHILLIP COLLINS, GENESIO LOBATO, THOMAS MCVITTY and GARY CHEATLE's Motion To Quash Defendants Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records And Or For Protective Order; Requests For Sanctions DENIED. Defendants provided verified responses prior to the hearing on the motion, and the further responses are not before the court. Request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP COLLINS et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Haylee Yee'S And Suzanne Wong'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Phillip Collins', Genesio Lobato'S, Thomas Mcvitty'S, And Gary Cheatle'S Further Discovery Responses And For Monetary Santions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 20, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS HAYLEE YEE and SUZANNE WONG's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Phillip Collins', Genesio Lobato'S, Thomas Mcvitty'S, And Gary Cheatle'S Further Discovery Responses And For Monetary Santions granted in part and denied in part as follows: a) The motion is denied as to form interrogatories. Supplemental responses were served and the adequacy of the supplemental responses is not before the court. b) The motion is granted with respect to special interrogatory number 61 but denied as to all the remaining special interrogatories. Responses to any amended special interrogatories would be the subject of a separate motion to compel. 2. The motion to compel further responses to the Request for Production of Documents is granted. Plaintiffs are to provide an amended response without boilerplate objections or equivocation to the Request for Production, Set One, pursuant to C.C.P. §2031.210 within ten (10) days. See Weil & Brown, et al., CAL. PRAC. GUIDE: CIV PRO BEFORE TRIAL (The Rutter Group 2014) §§8:1469 - 1470 as to content. If documents have not yet been produced, responsive documents must be produced within twenty (20) days. Any specific objections as to privilege, including without limitation privacy, attorney-client, or attorney work product, must be documented by a privilege log. 3. The request for sanctions by both parties is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA EDITH CONTRERAS et al VS. D'ANDRE WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint Of Carl Harris
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 20, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT D'ANDRE WHITE's Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint Of Carl Harris moot in light of ruling on demurrer. Moving party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA EDITH CONTRERAS et al VS. D'ANDRE WHITE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 20, 2015 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT D ANDRE WHITE's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) in support of each element of the elder abuse cause of action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Carl Harris has standing. In re Estate of Lowrie (2004) 118 Cal.App.4th 220. Moving party prepare order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. K. MICHAEL FORREST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 20, 2015 line 8. PLAINTIFF PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED's Motion For Summary Adjudication DENIED. There is a triable issue of fact re: affirmative defense of unclean hands as to whether Plaintiff decided to go out of the residential rental business and what "all units until sold" means. = (501/REQ)
